name: Cream Cheese Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sliced fresh or frozen rhubarb, in 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the cornstarch, sugar and salt. Add water and stir until well combined.
2. Add rhubarb to the saucepan. Cook, stirring often, until the mixture boils and thickens.
3. Pour the rhubarb filling into the pie shell. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, prepare the topping by beating cream cheese, water, and sugar until smooth.
5. Pour the cream cheese topping over the baked crust.
6. Return the pie to the oven and reduce heat to 325°F.
7. Bake for 35 minutes or until set. Cool completely.
8. Chill several hours or overnight before serving. Garnish with whipped cream and almonds.
